examples: A vital witness came forward to say that she saw Tanner wearing the boots.
Now you tell me how Bob Tanner done it, Huck.
Well, that sounds like a good way; but that ain't the way Bob Tanner done.
Last year, Tanner was enrolled in a clinical trial testing the drug, called drisapersen.
Two members of Lesley Tanner's family see a black puma like cat on a housing estate.
